rows.label: qev040501_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Moimoi! Is the Legen-dar
still not ready-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0002
rows.name:
Brother, please wait a little longer-mo...
Inspiration is about to descend upon Moimoi,
the King of Inventions, any second now-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hurry up-mo... While we're doing this,
Muimui and Moimoi's living expenses
are steadily running out-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Mo-mo? Are you a BLADE-mo?
Muimui and Moimoi joined BLADE
to make a quick buck...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0005
rows.name:
Brother! If you say things like
that, the BLADE higher-ups will
get mad at you again-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0006
rows.name:
Uh... we were allowed to join BLADE in
order to protect the peace of NLA-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0007
rows.name:
That's right, since you're a BLADE, I want you to
teach Muimui various things-mo. You know... like
money-making opportunities... do you have any-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev040501_SEL0011
rows.name: Teach Muimui various things about BLADE.

rows.label: qev040501_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev040501_SEL0021
rows.name: Chide Muimui for his arrogant attitude.

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hmm... Hmm, hmm... I see, BLADE members
have put their bodies on the line to
protect this city from many enemies-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0009
rows.name:
...But that's not what
Muimui wants to know-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0010
rows.name:
I want to know how to quickly and
easily complete high-paying jobs-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0011
rows.name:
Don't be so stiff-mo. Come
on... you have some, right-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0012
rows.name:
An incredibly wonderful mission that's
soooo easy and pays reeeeally well...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Eh, there are no jobs like
that-mo? I just have to steadily
complete requests diligently-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0014
rows.name:
Muimui and Moimoi are insanely
poor, so we can't afford to
slowly do small requests-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0015
rows.name:
...It seems we have no choice
but to bet everything on this
Legen-dar after all-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_JNK0030
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev040501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask what the Legen-dar is.

rows.label: qev040501_JNK0040
rows.name: Preach

rows.label: qev040501_SEL0041
rows.name:
Preach the importance of
steadily completing requests.

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0016
rows.name:
It's a super radar being built by
the number one Nopon inventor and
my little brother... Moimoi-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0017
rows.name:
It's a device that detects the weak radio waves
emitted by our ancestors' treasure sleeping on
Planet Mira... the Sword of Legendaryness-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0018
rows.name:
Even among rare Nopon legendary goods, if we can
just find the super rare Sword of Legendaryness,
Collepedians should pay us a ton of money for it-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0019
rows.name:
Preaching won't fill my stomach-mo!
Besides, Muimui and Moimoi spent a
lot of money to make this radar-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0020
rows.name:
If we can't find the Sword of
Legendaryness with the power of
the Legen-dar... we're ruined-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0021
rows.name:
No matter what, we're going to find the super rare
Sword of Legendaryness among Nopon legendary goods
and get a huge reward from Collepedians-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0022
rows.name:
That's right... Even if the radar
is completed, my equipment is a bit
too iffy to go outside NLA-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0023
rows.name:
To send off a promising junior,
I want you, as my senior, to help
make the Infinigoggles-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0024
rows.name:
Please-mo! For BLADEs, the bond between
comrades is important, right-mo? I want you
to help Muimui out at a huge discount-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0025
rows.name:
The negotiation is settled-mo! Well
then, go get the materials for the
Infinigoggles right away-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0026
rows.name:
Taut Leather and a White Mirrorglass...
As long as we have those, Moimoi can whip
up the Infinigoggles in no time-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0027
rows.name:
Oh, and also bring some snacks...
no, wait... I want you to bring
Sonar Lemons for food too-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0028
rows.name:
Well then, Moimoi will definitely complete
the Legen-dar in the meantime-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0029
rows.name:
BLADE person! Let's use our combined strength
to send my Brother off on his journey to
find the Sword of Legendaryness-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0036
rows.name:
Well then, go get the materials for Muimui's
exclusive Infinigoggles-mo! What we need is
Taut Leather and a White Mirrorglass...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0037
rows.name:
Oh, and food needed for the
long journey... I want you
to get Sonar Lemons too-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0038
rows.name:
...I'm asking you to do this super fast-mo. Muimui
wants to find the Sword of Legendaryness quickly
and escape from the depths of poverty-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0039
rows.name:
Oh... Did you get the materials-mo? The Legen-dar
is finished over here-mo. Fufu, as expected of my
little brother, the Nopon King of Inventions-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0040
rows.name:
Thank you-mo! With this, I think Moimoi
can make some amazing Infinigoggles-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0041
rows.name:
With this... the journey to find the
Sword of Legendaryness finally begins-mo!
I'm going to strike it rich-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_JNK0050
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev040501_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask why Moimoi is not here.

rows.label: qev040501_JNK0060
rows.name: Cheer

rows.label: qev040501_SEL0061
rows.name: Cheer on the highly motivated Muimui.

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0042
rows.name:
As expected of a veteran BLADE-mo.
You notice the small details-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0043
rows.name:
As for Moimoi, he went out saying
he was going to check the Legen-dar-mo.
He should be back soon...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0044
rows.name: Thank you-mo! You're a kind senior-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0045
rows.name:
Alright... Now we just have to
wait for Moimoi, who went to check
the Legen-dar, to come back...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0046
rows.name: ...Hm?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0047
rows.name:
Ugh... Brother... It was
terrible-mo... *sniffle*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0048
rows.name:
Wh... what happened-mo!? Moimoi... Your
whole body smells very weird-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0049
rows.name:
Ugh... I went to Biahno Lake following
the Legen-dar's signal, and there was
a super ferocious Terebra there...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0050
rows.name:
It swallowed Moimoi whole-mo. I barely
made it out alive, but... its breath
smelled terrible, it was the worst-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_JNK0070
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev040501_SEL0071
rows.name: Worry about Moimoi.

rows.label: qev040501_JNK0080
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev040501_SEL0081
rows.name:
Suggest that he take a
bath as soon as possible.

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0051
rows.name:
Purposely not mentioning this
horrific smell, your consideration...
is very wonderful-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0052
rows.name:
But... right now there's
something much more terrible
than what happened to Moimoi-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0053
rows.name:
Ugh, is Moimoi really that...
bad-mo? That Terebra must have
eaten something really weird-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0054
rows.name:
But... this isn't the time
to be taking a bath-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0055
rows.name:
At that time... the Terebra
swallowed the Legen-dar too-mo!!
Waaaaaah! Sorry, Brother![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0056
rows.name:
There, there-mo. Just the fact that you made
it back alive like this is good enough-mo.
You don't need to worry about that-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0057
rows.name:
*sniffle*... But what do we do-mo? It
takes 30,000G to remake that-mo. We don't
have that kind of money anywhere-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0058
rows.name:
It's okay-mo, this BLADE person
will either raise the money for us,
or defeat the Terebra for us...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0059
rows.name:
I'm sure they'll manage
something-mo. This person is
that kind of wonderful person-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0060
rows.name:
You can either give Moimoi the money for the
Legen-dar-mo, or you can defeat the ferocious
Terebra at Biahno Lake in the west and take it back-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0061
rows.name:
Anyway, I want you to help Muimui and Moimoi-mo.
At this rate, the money we invested in the radar
won't come back... and we'll go bankrupt-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0062
rows.name:
Please-mo? Let's help each other
out as fellow BLADE comrades-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0063
rows.name: Oh... Did you get the Legen-dar back-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0064
rows.name:
...Wait, it smells too much-mo! And its
condition seems a bit weird too-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0065
rows.name:
I really can't carry this around-mo.
I want you to give it to Moimoi
and have him adjust it-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0066
rows.name:
Oh... Is the Legen-dar fixed-mo?
As expected of Moimoi-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0067
rows.name:
...Ooh!! The Legen-dar is properly
reacting-mo! With this, we can search
for the Sword of Legendaryness-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0068
rows.name:
...Yes, Brother! The Infinigoggles
are also complete-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0069
rows.name:
With this, you'll immediately know if a
dangerous monster is approaching-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0070
rows.name:
Thank you-mo! Alright... All the preparations
are finished-mo. Well then, I'm going to
enthusiastically set off on my journey-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_JNK0090
rows.name: Cheer

rows.label: qev040501_SEL0091
rows.name:
Pray that he finds the
Sword of Legendaryness.

rows.label: qev040501_JNK0100
rows.name: Warn

rows.label: qev040501_SEL0101
rows.name:
Warn him that terrifying creatures
await in the outside world.

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0071
rows.name:
With the Legen-dar that Moimoi
made, I'll definitely find it-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0072
rows.name:
It's okay-mo! With the Infinigoggles Moimoi
made, I'll spot the monsters first and...
run, run, and run away like crazy-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0073
rows.name: Well then-mo! I'm off-mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040501_MSG0074
rows.name: Have a safe trip-mo, Brother!![ST:wait ]
